Thank you for your interest in the Saanich Peninsula Hospital & Healthcare Foundation

We appreciate your enthusiasm for our Foundation. At this time, we are not actively seeking additional team members.

Please check back in the future for potential opportunities—we value passionate individuals who share our commitment to healthcare and community support.
